title: Tony's Simple Cheese
description:
Always wanted cheese in minecraft? This mod adds just that!

The mod adds several different items to the game in a very vanilla way.

It's a very simple and lightweight mod.
body:
## **Discontinued, check out this mod instead: https://modrinth.com/mod/acam**


Always wanted cheese in minecraft? This mod adds just that!

The mod adds several different items to the game in a very vanilla way.

It's a very simple and lightweight mod.

The recipes are shown in the gallery.

Do make sure you have forge installed.


The items added are:

- cheese (Can be placed just like a normal block)

- piece of cheese

- slice of cheese

- bread with cheese

- toast

- toast with cheese

 

Any suggestions for the mod? Please tell them, because I'd love to hear them.

Any bugs? Please inform me, because if there are, I would like to remove them.

 

If we hit 200 downloads on modrinth, then I'll make a new texture pack.

 

Join my discord server here! https://discord.gg/vEc4wBSF
